title: Section 55
content: The Commissioner shall be paid out of the Municipal Fund such monthly salary and such monthly allowances, if any, as may from time to time be fixed by 1[2[the Central Government]] and may be given such facilities (if any) in relation to residential accommodation, conveyance and the like as may from time to time be fixed by that Government: Provided that the salary of the Commissioner shall not be varied to his disadvantage after his appointment.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for “Central Government” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “Government” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
